module.name: cli
module.spec: Run dispatches on args[0] to init, todo, reset, or link. Unknown commands return an error message and exit code 1. Missing args return a usage message and exit code 1.

formatTodo returns "No changes detected." when there are no todos. Otherwise it prints a count of changed markers and changed specs, then lists each todo with its edge description, file locations, and the drift reason (marker changed, spec changed, or both), ending with the reset command to run.

The reset command requires a marker and a module.spec argument, space-separated. Missing arguments return a usage error. On success it returns empty string with exit code 0. On error it returns the error message with exit code 1.

The link command requires a marker and a module.spec argument, space-separated. Missing arguments return a usage error. On success it returns "Linked marker X to spec Y" with exit code 0. On error it returns the error message with exit code 1.
